name: Shifter Box
description: A box that changes color every 3 taps. Time your moves to get the color you need!
howToPlay: Shifter boxes have a rainbow border and a circular arrow icon. Every time you tap 3 boxes anywhere on the grid, all Shifter boxes change to a random new color. Plan your taps carefully — tap the Shifter when its color matches a sort column you need to fill! Open the Level Editor to place Shifter boxes and test them yourself.
